overall.description: A cinematic scene from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy) depicting the interior of The Three Broomsticks tavern. The player character stands in the warm, fire-lit medieval hall with wooden architecture, observing NPCs on the upper balcony while surrounded by rustic furniture and magical ambiance.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval tavern hall with upper gallery and fireplace

events.description: player character raises right hand in a brief gesture or wave

agents.ego_description: standing in the tavern center, shifting weight slightly and briefly raising hand in a gesture

notable_agents.action: standing on upper balcony overlooking the main hall
seated at wooden table near the wall

entered.detail: carved wooden railing on the upper floor overlooking the main hall
large stone fireplace with burning fire providing warm illumination
wooden tavern sign with gold lettering mounted above the fireplace
large circular iron chandelier with candles hanging from the ceiling
rustic wooden tables and benches arranged for patrons
decorative fabric tapestries hanging on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The player character stands in the center of The Three Broomsticks tavern, a warm medieval hall illuminated by fireplace and candlelight. NPCs occupy the upper balcony and a table to the right, while the camera remains mostly stationary, capturing the detailed wooden architecture and cozy atmosphere. The character briefly raises their hand in a gesture around the midpoint of the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady, immersive gaze within the warm, fire-lit interior of The Three Broomsticks tavern. It begins with the player character standing in the center of the medieval hall, surrounded by rustic wooden architecture illuminated by the soft glow of candlelight and a fireplace. As the camera lingers on the cozy atmosphere, the view encompasses NPCs gathered at a table to the right and others observing from the upper balcony. The scene then shifts slightly as the character briefly raises their hand in a gesture, maintaining the focus on the detailed, magical ambiance of the tavern.
